---
title: "Dumbstruck Elegant Spreadwing"
authors:
  - name: "SarahDeVivo"
    url: "https://github.com/SarahDeVivo"
  - name: "FjodorTarabrin"
    url: "https://github.com/FjodorTarabrin"
  - name: "Jimmyiscoming"
    url: "https://github.com/Jimmyiscoming"
authors_links: "[SarahDeVivo](https://github.com/SarahDeVivo), [FjodorTarabrin](https://github.com/FjodorTarabrin), [Jimmyiscoming](https://github.com/Jimmyiscoming)"
rank: 1
image: "image.png"
---
**Screencast**

<video controls width="100%" style="margin-bottom: 2em;"><source src="group_dumbstruck_elegant_spreadwing_screencast.mp4" type="video/mp4"></video>
**Ausarbeitung**

<iframe src="Projekt_Facebook.html" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="1200" style="border:0"></iframe>
